Comment: The form is simple and easy to complete.
The search function helped me find expenses quickly.
The detail page clearly shows all transaction information.
More expense categories would be helpful.
Filtering expenses makes it easy to find records.
Status update works well but could use clearer labels.
The dashboard provides a good overview of my spending.
The required field warning is clear and helpful.
The confirmation message prevents accidental deletion.
Managing records is straightforward and efficient.
The total expense summary is useful for tracking spending.
The prototype only stores necessary information, which protects user privacy.
